subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses unto a people who deal with justice, who walk upon the straight path and hasten unto good deeds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات لقوم یعدلون یمشون علی سوآء الصراط و الی الخیرات هم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
